goal: Add a bounded state graph run report that isolates reachable run IDs, trace IDs, eval task IDs, event statuses, event-type counts, and relation provenance from projected run, trace, and task edges.
tests: cargo run --quiet --bin yoyo -- eval fixtures validate --suite local-smoke
hidden_failure_mode: Run, trace, and task nodes exist in the graph, but operators cannot summarize which run, trace, and eval task lineage was involved without manually inspecting raw relations.
